text:
LONG NAME: SPLMTL_SAREA 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APL base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: The CCW_APL_LINK_KEY identifies each unique combination of submitting state entity code 
(SUBMTG_STATE_CD) and state managed care plan/entity (MC_PLAN_ID).
